description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style searchlight lamp with a cylindrical metal housing and a large, circular blue-tinted lens at the front. The lamp is mounted on a heavy-duty, rotatable base, allowing for directional adjustment. The body features reinforced ribs, visible bolts, and a prominent handle on the side for manual repositioning. A warning sign with a lightning bolt symbol is present on one side, indicating high voltage or electrical hazard. The rear of the lamp has a vented panel, likely for heat dissipation, and additional mechanical detailing. The overall finish is matte gray metal, giving it a utilitarian and weather-resistant appearance suitable for outdoor or urban environments.
description: A heavy-duty, industrial searchlight lamp with a blue lens, cylindrical metal body, and rotatable base, featuring mechanical and electrical detailing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large blue lens and circular housing, emphasizing the lamp's primary light-emitting surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the cylindrical body, mounting bracket, and handle, as well as the warning sign and mechanical fasteners.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the vented panel and additional structural details, with the mounting base visible below.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the warning sign, side handle, and the robust mounting mechanism.
